title: Squirrel Removal in Ardsley, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Ardsley, Westchester. Humane extraction, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Ardsley homes. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Ardsley home can cause serious damage to attics, insulation, and wiring. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Ardsley and Westchester County, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges faced by Ardsley homeowners and deliver effective, lasting results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Ardsley residents for years with proven squirrel removal expertise and a commitment to humane, effective wildlife control. Our licensed technicians offer same-day emergency service, thorough attic inspections, and guaranteed exclusion work to keep your Ardsley home squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Ardsley's tree-lined streets and beautiful historic homes near the Saw Mill River Parkway provide ideal habitats for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and chimneys. From properties near Pascone Park to residences throughout the Ardsley Woods area, our team understands the architectural features of local homes and implements customized squirrel exclusion strategies that protect your property's character and value.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Ardsley typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or repair work is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Ardsley?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Ardsley residents for emergency squirrel removal situations. Our team is familiar with the area and can quickly reach homes throughout Ardsley and surrounding Westchester communities to assess and address your squirrel problem.

faqs.question: What does the squirrel removal process involve?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive squirrel removal process includes a thorough attic and exterior inspection, humane trapping and removal of all squirrels, identification and sealing of all entry points, attic sanitization and insulation repair if needed, and a warranty on our exclusion work to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Ardsley home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Ardsley homes by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), destroying insulation, gnawing on wood structures, and leaving contaminated droppings in attics. They can also create noise disturbances and attract other pests. Professional removal is essential to protect your property and family.
